title: Watts — Business Overview
content: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. (the "Company"), through its subsidiaries, is one of the world's leading manufacturers and providers of products and solutions that manage and conserve the flow of fluids and energy into, through, and out of buildings for the water quality, water conservation, water safety, and water flow control markets.

title: Watts — Employees
content: As of December 31, 2023, the Company had approximately 5,100 employees worldwide.

title: Watts — Operating Margin
content: Its reported operating margin was 17.1% in 2023, an increase of 120 basis points compared to the prior year.

title: Watts — Cash Flow
content: The Company generated operating cash flow of $311 million and free cash flow of $281 million for the full year 2023.

title: Watts — Operating Income
content: The Company's operating income was $350.9 million in 2023, an increase of $35.9 million, or 11.4%, compared to 2022.

title: Watts — EPS
content: The Company reported earnings per share of $7.82 for fiscal year 2023, an increase of 5% compared to the prior year.

title: Mueller — Business Overview
content: Mueller Water Products, Inc. (the "Company") is a leading manufacturer and marketer of products and services used in the transmission, distribution, and measurement of water in the United States and internationally.

title: Mueller — Employees
content: As of September 30, 2023, the Company had approximately 3,700 employees worldwide.

title: Mueller — Operating Margin
content: Its reported operating margin was 14.3% in fiscal year 2023, an increase of 190 basis points compared to the prior year.

title: Mueller — Cash Flow
content: The Company generated operating cash flow of $133 million and free cash flow of $97 million for the full year fiscal 2023.

title: Mueller — Operating Income
content: The Company's operating income was $151.6 million in fiscal 2023, an increase of $28.5 million, or 23.2%, compared to fiscal 2022.

title: Mueller — EPS
content: The Company reported earnings per share of $0.98 for fiscal year 2023, an increase of 15% compared to the prior year.

title: Haynes — Business Overview
content: Haynes International, Inc. (the "Company") is a leading developer, manufacturer, and marketer of technologically advanced, high-performance alloys primarily for use in the aerospace, industrial gas turbine, and chemical processing industries.

title: Haynes — Employees
content: As of September 30, 2023, the Company had approximately 1,850 employees worldwide.

title: Haynes — Operating Margin
content: Its reported operating margin was 10.0% in fiscal year 2023, an increase of 450 basis points compared to the prior year.

title: Haynes — Cash Flow
content: The Company generated operating cash flow of $66 million and free cash flow of $43 million for the full year fiscal 2023.

title: Haynes — Operating Income
content: The Company's operating income was $64.0 million in fiscal 2023, an increase of $28.2 million, or 78.9%, compared to fiscal 2022.

title: Haynes — EPS
content: The Company reported earnings per share of $5.53 for fiscal year 2023, an increase of 88% compared to the prior year.
